title: Cortisol senken: Wie Atemübungen und Meditation das Stresshormon regulieren

longTail: breathing exercises you can do at your desk without anyone noticing
best breathing technique for work stress
how to calm down at work with breathing

competitorInsights: Articles from CNBC, Nivati, and Health Assured list techniques but lack workplace-specific context. Gaps: No guidance for discreet practice in open offices, missing tips for integrating with video calls/meetings, limited focus on preventing stress vs reactive management, no employer/HR perspective for corporate wellness programs.
suggestedAngle: Focus on discreet, office-appropriate techniques with specific scenarios (before presentation, during conflict, mid-afternoon slump, after difficult call). Include visual guides for desk-friendly postures, timing recommendations for breaks, and downloadable workplace wellness toolkit for HR departments.
reasoning: Fills critical breathing category gap, directly builds on existing stress content with expanded keyword diversity, strong commercial intent for B2B partnerships, complements existing anxiety/breathing techniques articles, highest strategic value for brand differentiation
